title: The Farmer Takes a Wife
writer: Walter D. Edmonds, Marc Connelly, Frank B. Elser
actors: Janet Gaynor, Henry Fonda, Charles Bickford
plot: Charming love story set on the Erie Canal in the mid-19th Century. A farmer works on the canal to earn money to buy a farm. He meets a cook on a canal boat, but she can't even consider leaving the exciting life on the canal for a ...
